summary: Iteration 81 - Principal Timetable Page (PrincipalTimetablePage) Testing. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend tests passed (100%). Fixed bug: Frontend was calling wrong endpoint /api/school-settings/time-slots instead of /api/time-slots. The new timetable page loads correctly with all components: header, status banner, action bar, readiness panel, view controls, timetable grid, insights panel, version manager, and issues section.

tests: TEST 3: Navigated to timetable page - PASSED
TEST 7: AI Generation Modal opened - PASSED
TEST 8: Modal content displayed correctly - PASSED
TEST 9: Fix buttons work (navigate to settings) - PASSED

Page Header.details: Shows page title 'الجدول المدرسي', metadata chips (8 فصل, 8 معلم, 40 حصة), and status badge

Status Banner.details: Shows 'لا توجد نسخة جدول مولدة حالياً' with 'ابدأ التوليد' button

Action Bar.details: Shows action buttons including 'معالجة الجدول بالذكاء الاصطناعي' (disabled when not ready)

Readiness Panel.details: Shows 11% readiness with 8 critical issues and 1 warning. Categories: السياق الأكاديمي (0/20), أيام الدراسة (0/15), هيكل اليوم الدراسي (0/25), الفصول الدراسية (0/20), المعلمون (0/15), إسنادات المعلمين (0/25), القيود (5/10), المنهج الرسمي (10/10)

View Controls.details: Shows tabs: بالفصل, بالمعلم, بالصف, باليوم. Toggles for breaks, prayer, warnings, colors. Search box and filter dropdowns

Timetable Grid.details: Shows weekly grid with 5 working days (الأحد-الخميس), time slots with periods, breaks, and prayer times. Empty cells show 'فارغة'

AI Generation Modal.details: Opens on 'ابدأ التوليد' click. Shows generation input summary (8 معلم, 8 فصل, 40 حصة, 12 مادة), readiness status, and 'بدء المعالجة' button (disabled when data incomplete)

Insights Panel.details: Shows summary with required/distributed/undistributed sessions and quality score

Version Manager.details: Shows 'لا توجد نسخ جدول' when no versions exist

Issues Section.details: Shows 'لا توجد مشاكل أو تحذيرات' when timetable is healthy

api_verification_summary.GET /api/timetable-readiness/check: 200 OK - Returns readiness report with categories and issues

critical_code_review_comments: All timetable page components are properly implemented with data-testid attributes
API integration is working correctly for all endpoints
Readiness panel correctly shows 11% because school data is incomplete (no academic year, semester, working days, etc.)
AI Generation Modal correctly disables 'بدء المعالجة' button when data is incomplete
Fix buttons correctly navigate to settings page with appropriate tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Principal Timetable Page (/principal/timetable) is fully functional. All components are working: header, status banner, action bar, readiness panel (showing 11% due to incomplete school data), view controls (tabs for class/teacher/grade/day views), timetable grid (showing empty cells), insights panel, version manager, and issues section. The AI Generation Modal opens correctly and shows generation input summary. Fix buttons navigate to settings page. The page uses localStorage.getItem('nassaq_token') || localStorage.getItem('token') for authentication. Time slots are fetched from /api/time-slots endpoint.
